subject: [PATCH 4/4] testing: add dontcache-bench local filesystem benchmark suite

2026-04-01.patch_summary: This patch adds a new benchmark suite called 'dontcache-bench' to test the IOCB_DONTCACHE flag on local filesystems using fio's io_uring engine. The suite includes various job files and scripts to run and parse the results of these tests, mirroring the existing nfsd-io-bench test matrix but with different I/O modes. The goal is to evaluate the performance impact of disabling caching for I/O operations on local filesystems.
